headline: Lockheed Martin’s New Defense Wins Deepen Long Term Revenue Visibility
summary: Lockheed Martin (NYSE: LMT) has been named preferred combat systems integrator for Australia’s Virginia-class submarine fleet under the AUKUS program. The company received a US$879 million Pentagon contract related to F-35 aircraft armament. Lockheed Martin also secured major Canadian contracts for Hercules fleet maintenance and upgrades. For investors watching NYSE: LMT, these contract wins highlight fresh activity across multiple allied defense budgets rather than routine order flow. The...
